cases.prompt: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or its immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH sedro_woolley_parcels AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
  WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
    AND ps.acres BETWEEN 1 AND 3
), low_quality_improvements AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(i.ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number, 'MSL low-quality improvement class' AS match_reasons
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') i
  WHERE TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSL'
)
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.situs_address, ps.city_name, ps.acres, ps.land_use, ps.assessed_value, lq.match_reasons
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
JOIN sedro_woolley_parcels sw ON ps.parcel_number = sw.parcel_number
JOIN low_quality_improvements lq ON ps.parcel_number = lq.parcel_number
ORDER BY ps.acres DESC
cases.title: Sedro-Woolley Area Parcels with Low Quality Residential Dwellings and 1-3 Acres
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels in Sedro-Woolley city or immediate unincorporated vicinity, with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality (improvement class MSL), and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres

cases.prompt: lots in sedro-woolley or marblemount that are over 1 acre with utilities and no improvements.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.situs_address, ps.situs_city_state_zip, ps.acres, TRIM(a."Utilities") AS utilities, ps.improvement_building_count
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/assessor.parquet') AS a ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(a."Parcel Number")
WHERE ps.acres > 1
  AND (LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%' OR LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'marblemount' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%marblemount%')
  AND TRIM(COALESCE(a."Utilities", '')) <> ''
  AND ps.improvement_building_count = 0
cases.title: Lots in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount Over 1 Acre with Utilities and No Improvements
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount, larger than 1 acre, having utilities, and with zero improvements

action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.situs_address, ps.situs_city_state_zip, ps.owner_name, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.improvement_building_count, ps.has_geometry
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
  AND ps.acres > 0
  AND ps.has_geometry = TRUE
  AND (ps.land_use LIKE '(911%' OR lower(ps.land_use) LIKE '%recreation%')
  AND ps.improvement_building_count = 0
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%181%'
  AND lower(ps.land_use) NOT LIKE '%condo%'
  AND lower(ps.land_use) NOT LIKE '%common area%'
cases.title: Recreation Lots in Sedro-Woolley
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels in Sedro-Woolley city or situs city state zip containing 'sedro-woolley', with land use indicating recreational or undeveloped land, excluding mobile home leased property, condominiums, public/civic/open-space parcels, zero-acre or no-geometry parcels, and parcels with residential dwelling evidence.
